webrtc_datachannel_callbacks_t(3) Library Functions Manual webrtc_datachannel_callbacks_t(3)

NAME

webrtc_datachannel_callbacks_t - DataChannel callback structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/webrtc/webrtc.h>

Data Fields


void(* on_open )(webrtc_data_channel_t *dc, void *user_data)
Channel opened. void(* on_close )(webrtc_data_channel_t *dc, void *user_data)
Channel closed. void(* on_error )(webrtc_data_channel_t *dc, const char *error, void *user_data)
Error occurred. void(* on_message )(webrtc_data_channel_t *dc, const uint8_t *data, size_t len, void *user_data)
Message received. void * user_data
Passed to all callbacks.

Detailed Description

DataChannel callback structure.

Callbacks for DataChannel events (open, close, error, message). Used with webrtc_datachannel_set_callbacks() to register per-channel callbacks.

Definition at line 319 of file include/ascii-chat/network/webrtc/webrtc.h.
